turns.assistant_text:
Dưới đây là 5 tweet mới nhất của Elon Musk:

1. **[RT @DimaZeniuk](https://x.com/elonmusk/status/2061705200734543896)**: Neuralink is planning its first Blindsight implant later this year, aiming to restore limited vision even for people who have lost it. (Retweets: 255)

2. **[All accessories to the murder must go to prison for a long time](https://x.com/elonmusk/status/2061704965639618851)**: All accessories to the murder must go to prison for a long time. (Likes: 2908, Retweets: 409)

3. **[RT @visegrad24](https://x.com/elonmusk/status/2061701267257442740)**: In his final moments, Henry Nowak told police officers nine times “I can’t breathe” and four times that he had been stabbed. (Retweets: 9114)

4. **[RT @DaveKent101](https://x.com/elonmusk/status/2061701118925865253)**: Today’s question. Why hasn’t Vickrum Digwa’s brother (Gurpreet Digwa) been arrested and charged with assisting an offender? (Retweets: 770)

5. **[RT @RDonaldson91](https://x.com/elonmusk/status/2061699685048631582)**: I’ve just watched the Henry Nowak body-cam footage. Digwa deserves the death penalty and his family who covered for him do too. (Retweets: 1612)

Nếu bạn cần thêm thông tin, hãy cho tôi biết!
